title: Hypno's Cobblemon Premier
description: A modpack centered around Cobblemon with progression and quality-of-life features!
body:
![Hypno's Cobblemon Premier Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b381e8443e4ea29c031a21fc68ce41c3228a4d6.png)

**Hypno's Cobblemon Evolved aims to provide an exceptional [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) experience! Fight trainers, encounter legendary Pokémon, and become a Pokémon master!**


The mod is preconfigured and works great out of the box. It should run on servers flawlessly.


# Features

> ## Battle formidable trainers!
> ![A Pokemon Battle!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pSeP2p9R/images/854b088726afac1254d9c777917cff339b6f9323.gif)

> ## Encounter Legendary creatures!
> ![Summoning Rayquaza](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pSeP2p9R/images/e4ff82cf31c61c56471de684162de2fd4cb199c6.gif)

> ## Ride Pokemon!
> ![Riding Shiny Pidgeot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pSeP2p9R/images/1f51605edcf34d7f25397b63397e76f9686dcb30.webp)

> ## And so much more!

<details>
<summary>Resource and Data Packs Included</summary>

- [E19 - Cobblemon Minimap Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/e19_cobblemon_minimap_icons)
- [Radical Cobblemon Trainer Textures Plus](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rct-trainer-textures-plus)
- [AllTheMons x Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy)
- [LackingMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lackingmons)
  - Currently, we only implement the texture and model for Galarian Weezing from this pack.

</details>

# For Server Owners:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Be sure to install [Oracle Index](https://modrinth.com/mod/oracle-index) onto your server along with the client-side mods, as Simply Swords depends on it.
- Be sure to install [Athena](https://modrinth.com/mod/athena-mod) onto your server along with the client-side mods, as CobbleFurnies depends on it.

</details>
